Department of Student Affairs

Istanbul Galata University Student Affairs Department provides the necessary contribution to the regular and healthy execution of the education and training process at our University and is obliged to prepare and present information and documents in a timely and accurate manner to students, academic staff and all units and institutions with which it is in contact.
